mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND type = #{type} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND is_official = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY usage_count DESC
